subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-06-11
subcodes.first_line: It is obvious that a very deep relationship exists between the spirit of man
subcodes.first_line_orig: معلوم است ما بین روح انسانی و حقایق موجودات ارتباطی عظیم است
subcodes.subjects: @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @mind as intermediary between soul and body, @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being, @meaning; importance of dreams and visions
